Journal Article · Small, 17, 2005728

A Multifunctional Nanovaccine Based on L-Arginine-Loaded Black Mesoporous Titania: Ultrasound-Triggered Synergistic Cancer Sonodynamic Therapy/Gas Therapy/Immunotherapy with Remarkably Enhanced Efficacy

Meifang Wang, Zhiyao Hou*, Sainan Liu, Shuang Liang, Binbin Ding, Yajie Zhao, Mengyu Chang, Gang Han, Abdulaziz A. Al Kheraif, and Jun Lin*

DOI

Abstract

An L-arginine-loaded black mesoporous titania nanovaccine for ultrasound-triggered sonodynamic therapy, gas therapy, and immunotherapy.

Highlights

  • Combines sonodynamic therapy, gas therapy, and immunotherapy.
  • Uses black mesoporous titania as a multifunctional nanovaccine platform.

Add ultrasound-triggering and immune mechanism notes here.

Citation

Meifang Wang et al. A Multifunctional Nanovaccine Based on L-Arginine-Loaded Black Mesoporous Titania. Small 2021, 17, 2005728.
